description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular body with a prominent stock and a thick, cylindrical barrel extending from the front. The upper receiver is topped with a horizontal handle or carry bar, which is visually distinct and likely serves as a carrying aid or mounting point. The magazine appears to be integrated into the lower section of the rifle, with a compact, boxy form. The grip and trigger area are set beneath the main receiver, with ergonomic shaping for user comfort. The overall silhouette is blocky and utilitarian, suggesting a design focused on durability and function. The surface finish is matte, with subtle panel lines and a few small, colored accents near the magazine area.
description: A blocky, angular rifle with a prominent carry handle, thick barrel, and integrated box magazine, finished in a matte, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide stock, central carry handle, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular receiver, ergonomic grip, and the compact magazine area.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the barrel's end, symmetrical stock, and the carry handle above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular receiver and grip, with the magazine area visible.
